acceptance_targets: [chapter_18_F04] PASS if the revised chapter keeps no more than two total uses of 'nod'/'nodded' in the cited cluster and each replaced beat is legible as a different emotional state by direct reading; otherwise FAIL.

[chapter_18_F05] PASS if revised lines 301-321 include at least two separate interiority beats (thought/sensation/self-assessment) and no exterior-only run exceeds nine consecutive paragraphs in that stretch; otherwise FAIL.

[chapter_18_F06] PASS if revised cited lines retain the same factual commitments while reducing managerial-token repetition to no more than two occurrences across the cluster and adding at least two concrete non-bureaucratic images tied to body/place; otherwise FAIL.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter keeps no more than two total uses of 'nod'/'nodded' in the cited cluster and each replaced beat is legible as a different emotional state by direct reading; otherwise FAIL.
findings.problem: Recurring gesture formula: nodding is used as the default emotional beat well beyond the 'more than twice' threshold, flattening distinct moments of concession, shame, and relief into one repeated physical signal.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace nod-based beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:255, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:277, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:371 with distinct actions tied to each moment's emotional vector (deflection, agreement under pressure, procedural verification, guarded acceptance).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines 301-321 include at least two separate interiority beats (thought/sensation/self-assessment) and no exterior-only run exceeds nine consecutive paragraphs in that stretch; otherwise FAIL.
findings.problem: Interiority lapse: this sequence runs 11 consecutive exterior-only paragraphs (action/dialogue) with no Eli thought, sensation, or self-assessment, shifting the narration into screenplay mode during a transition that should still carry emotional residue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Thread brief close-third interior beats into snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:301-321 (for example at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:311 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:317) so interruption/comedy registers against Eli's current shame and vigilance.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised cited lines retain the same factual commitments while reducing managerial-token repetition to no more than two occurrences across the cluster and adding at least two concrete non-bureaucratic images tied to body/place; otherwise FAIL.
findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of style-bible stress vocabulary (terms, transparent, operational, numbers/checklist framing) starts to flatten prose and dialogue into one managerial register, reducing lexical surprise and emotional grain.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework diction at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:253, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:353, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:413 to keep accountability semantics but vary the language with scene-specific sensory and character-specific phrasing rather than repeated policy tokens.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
